narrative:
Marysville 6 (precinct in Union County) has 1,227 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.2 percentage points.
